Intelligence Platform

What is RoweOS?

RoweOS replaces fragmented workflows with a single intelligent layer that understands your brand as deeply as you do, and knows your life as intimately as you need it to.

BrandAI

Ingests your brand's DNA: voice, values, visual identity, positioning, audience context, and strategic objectives. Every output is informed by the full depth of your brand's identity system. New team members produce on-brand work from day one.

IdentityStudioAgentsLibraryAnalytics

LifeAI

Ingests your personal identity: goals, health profile, daily rhythm, financial situation, family structure, and career trajectory. Delivers deeply personalized coaching, planning, and optimization across every dimension of your life.

GoalsWellnessTax CopilotJournalGuardrails

The two modes are interconnected through cross-mode intelligence. Your Tax Copilot automatically receives revenue and expense data from every brand you manage. Your Life Coach understands your business ventures when coaching career decisions. This is not another marketing tool or wellness app. This is brand and life intelligence infrastructure.

Platform

Built for depth, not decoration

20 integrated views across brand intelligence, life management, and AI orchestration. Every screen designed with purpose.

BrandAI Chat Conversational brand intelligence with context-aware AI
Full Screen Chat Immersive AI workspace with complete sidebar navigation
Focus Dashboard Calendar, tasks, automations, and daily notes in one view
Pulse Tracking Goal progress, task completion, and weekly performance metrics
Agent Studio 173+ pre-built operations across strategy, marketing, and research
Brand Identity Brand essence, voice and tone, audience, messaging, and positioning
Brand Library Organized content storage across all brands with smart folders
Adaptive Operations Autonomous workflows, custom agents, and scheduled intelligence
Commerce and Analytics Multi-provider API tracking with usage, costs, and model breakdown
System Settings Theme customization, brand colors, logo upload, and AI integration
Light Mode Full light theme with warm accent colors and clean typography
Mode Selection Choose between Business (BrandAI) and Personal (LifeAI) modes
AI Providers Connect Claude, GPT, and Gemini with one-click provider setup
LifeAI Home Personal life intelligence with Focus, Pulse, and Studio modules
LifeAI Chat Personal AI assistant with contextual life coaching and planning
Life Identity Personal profile, goals, health, relationships, and career tracking
Life Progress Personal goal tracking with journal, weekly stats, and task management
Life Studio 90+ life operations across planning, wellness, finances, and development
Guardrails Custom system prompts, behavioral boundaries, and task categories
Rhythm Setup Personalize routines, habits, and focus areas for your lifestyle
